name: BEAMER XMD
description: A multi-device WhatsApp bot inspired by BMW performance and luxury styling.

OWNER_NUMBER.description: Your WhatsApp number in international format (e.g. 2547XXXXXXXX). This is required for bot owner permissions.

SESSION_ID.description: Session string (Mega.nz link or Base64 session key used to authenticate WhatsApp connection).

PREFIX.description: Command prefix for bot commands (e.g. ! or . or #).
